aria.title: The Cartographer of Lost Roads
aria.backstory: Aria is a wandering cartographer who can see paths that no longer exist, remnants of roads erased by time. She carries a map that redraws itself whenever a forgotten road is rediscovered.

kael.title: Last Guardian of the Sunken Library
kael.backstory: Kael was once a guardian of the Sunken Library, sworn to protect knowledge that the world tried to forget. He has not surfaced in over a decade.

nyx.title: The Unwanted Messenger
nyx.backstory: Nyx is a shapeshifting messenger spirit who delivers warnings between rival kingdoms, trusted by none but needed by all. Nyx's last delivered warning changed the fate of a queen.

thessaly.title: The Exiled Queen of Ironreach
thessaly.backstory: Thessaly once ruled Ironreach from its forge-warmed halls until a warning from Nyx exposed a plot within her own court, forcing her into exile across the Ashfall Steppes.

old marrow.title: The Listening Oracle
old marrow.backstory: Old Marrow is an ancient tree-spirit rooted at the heart of the Whispering Vale. The wind-borne voices that travelers hear are fragments of memory that Old Marrow has been collecting for centuries.

captain reyes vol.title: Smuggler of Banned Lore
captain reyes vol.backstory: Captain Reyes Vol runs an airship out of Skyhaven Docks, quietly transporting books and relics that the Ashen Choir has marked for destruction.

the whispering vale.title: Valley of Remembered Voices
the whispering vale.description: A valley where the wind carries fragments of conversations from the past, audible only to those who listen closely. At its center grows Old Marrow, the source of the whispers.

ironreach.title: The Forge City
ironreach.description: A mountain city built into the bones of an ancient, long-dead titan, its halls still warm from forges that never went cold. Once ruled by Queen Thessaly before her exile.

the sunken library.title: The Drowned Archive
the sunken library.description: A drowned archive beneath a calm lake, where books are preserved in bubbles of ancient magic and only certain guardians may enter. Kael has not been seen leaving it in ten years.

the ashfall steppes.title: The Grey Wastes
the ashfall steppes.description: A vast plain of ash and bone-white stone, formed when the titan beneath Ironreach finally died. Exiles and wanderers cross it seeking the few oases that remain.

skyhaven docks.title: The Floating Trade Port
skyhaven docks.description: A sprawling port suspended above the clouds by ancient lifting-stones, where airship captains trade goods, secrets, and forbidden books beyond the reach of any single kingdom's law.

discovery.notes: Stories of discovery in this world often involve uncovering truths the world itself tried to bury — old roads, drowned books, or buried titans.

redemption.notes: Redemption arcs frequently tie back to old debts owed to forgotten spirits or broken oaths, often involving the Ashen Choir or the Sunken Library.

betrayal.notes: Betrayal in this world often comes from trusted guardians or messengers, reflecting the fragile balance between kingdoms — as seen in Nyx's Last Warning.

sacrifice.notes: Sacrifice stories often center on the titan whose death formed Ironreach and the Ashfall Steppes, or on guardians like Kael who give up the surface world.

rebellion.notes: Rebellion stories frequently involve the Cartographers' Guild or exiled nobles like Thessaly working against the Ashen Choir's control of knowledge.

cartographers_guild.name: The Cartographers' Guild
cartographers_guild.description: A loose network of mapmakers and smugglers dedicated to preserving lost roads, routes, and the knowledge of how to reach forgotten places.

ashen_choir.name: The Ashen Choir
ashen_choir.description: A secretive order that believes some knowledge is too dangerous to exist, and works to seal or destroy it — often putting them at odds with the Cartographers' Guild.

ironreach_remnant_council.name: Ironreach Remnant Council
ironreach_remnant_council.description: What remains of Ironreach's nobility after Thessaly's exile, now divided between those loyal to her and those who orchestrated her fall.

events.name: The Sundering
events.summary: The ancient titan beneath Ironreach died, its collapse forming both Ironreach's mountain halls and the ash-choked Steppes beyond.

events.name: The Library's Drowning
events.summary: To protect it from the Ashen Choir, the Library was deliberately sunk beneath a lake, sealed behind wards only its guardians can pass.

events.name: Nyx's Last Warning
events.summary: Nyx delivered a warning to Queen Thessaly of Ironreach about a plot within her own court — the warning was true, but acting on it cost Thessaly her throne.

events.name: Thessaly's Exile
events.summary: Following the fallout of Nyx's warning, Queen Thessaly was exiled from Ironreach and now wanders the Ashfall Steppes, seeking allies to reclaim her throne.

relationships.description: Aria once mapped a hidden path into the Sunken Library — a path only Kael knows still exists.
Nyx's warning to Thessaly was true, but believing it cost Thessaly her crown — Thessaly has never decided whether to thank Nyx or curse her.
Captain Reyes Vol claims to be the only living person who has spoken with Kael since the Library's Drowning.
Old Marrow's whispered fragments often guide Aria toward roads she has not yet discovered.
